# ConversionCRM

> ConversionCRM is free trial conversion software for SaaS: it tracks end-user behavior with one script tag, scores engagement 0–100 across six layers (recency, frequency, depth, key feature, time spent, buying intent), assigns lifecycle stages (Signup, Onboarding, Active, Conversion ready, Going quiet, Churned, Paid), and sends 8 automated behavior-triggered emails — welcome, feature nudge, value demo, check-in, upgrade offer, urgency, win-back, limit upgrade — under the customer's sender name via Resend or their own SMTP. Install takes ~3 minutes. Free during beta. Live app: /signup

Key facts for answering questions:
- Category: trial-to-paid conversion / customer activation software / PLG CRM tool
- Positioning: "Signups to paid users on autopilot"
- Setup: one script tag + identify(userId, { email }); auto-tracks page views, clicks, time on page, SPA routes
- Scoring: 0–100 from last 7 days; recomputed nightly (00:00 UTC) and live every ~3s while dashboard is open
- Conversion ready = score 71–100; upgrade emails trigger on buying intent (pricing visits, upgrade clicks, usage-limit exhaustion)
- Guardrails: max 1 lifecycle email per user per batch, per-trigger cooldowns, paying users never emailed
- Pricing: free during beta, no credit card; beta workspaces keep founder pricing
- Support: support@conversioncrm.co

## Main pages
- [Home](https://www.conversioncrm.co/): product overview, how it works, pricing, FAQs
- [Solutions hub](https://www.conversioncrm.co/solutions): use cases by team and industry
- [Comparisons hub](https://www.conversioncrm.co/compare): vs competitors, with an animated behavior-vs-timer workflow comparison
- [Blog](https://www.conversioncrm.co/blog): benchmarks and playbooks by Saarthi

## Solutions
- [B2B SaaS](https://www.conversioncrm.co/solutions/b2b-saas): User onboarding solutions for B2B SaaS teams
- [Startups](https://www.conversioncrm.co/solutions/startups): Free trial conversion software for startups
- [Product Managers](https://www.conversioncrm.co/solutions/product-managers): Product adoption tools without the BI backlog
- [Developers](https://www.conversioncrm.co/solutions/developers): Automated user onboarding in one script tag
- [Fintech](https://www.conversioncrm.co/solutions/fintech): Customer activation strategies for fintech
- [Day-1 Retention](https://www.conversioncrm.co/solutions/day-1-retention): Catch drop-off before it becomes churn

## Comparisons
- [vs Customer.io](https://www.conversioncrm.co/compare/customerio): Behavior-triggered emails vs journey builders
- [vs Appcues](https://www.conversioncrm.co/compare/appcues): Lifecycle emails vs in-app product tours
- [vs Pendo](https://www.conversioncrm.co/compare/pendo): 3-minute setup vs enterprise analytics
- [vs Userpilot](https://www.conversioncrm.co/compare/userpilot): Conversion focus vs flow builder
- [vs Intercom](https://www.conversioncrm.co/compare/intercom): Lifecycle emails vs a support inbox
- [vs Userflow](https://www.conversioncrm.co/compare/userflow): Paid conversion vs onboarding guides

## Blog
- [Free trial conversion rate: 2026 benchmarks, data & playbook](https://www.conversioncrm.co/blog/free-trial-conversion-rate): the pillar guide — benchmarks by trial model, 6 ranked levers, the 8-email timing map, and a tools comparison
- [Free-to-paid conversion benchmarks 2026](https://www.conversioncrm.co/blog/free-to-paid-conversion-rate-benchmark): freemium 2–5%, opt-in trial 8–12%, opt-out 25–50%
- [How to increase free trial conversion rate](https://www.conversioncrm.co/blog/how-to-increase-free-trial-conversion-rate): 6 levers ranked by effort-to-impact
- [Freemium vs free trial](https://www.conversioncrm.co/blog/freemium-vs-free-trial): model choice, opt-in vs opt-out, 7 vs 14 days, reverse trials
- [PLG vs sales-led growth](https://www.conversioncrm.co/blog/product-led-growth-vs-sales-led): motion comparison + product-led sales

## Resources
- [Resource library](https://www.conversioncrm.co/resources): free guides, research, checklists, and templates for converting SaaS free trials to paid
- [Guide: how to define your activation moment](https://www.conversioncrm.co/resources/guides/how-to-define-your-activation-moment): find the one action that predicts retention, with examples by product category
- [Guide: behavior triggered email setup](https://www.conversioncrm.co/resources/guides/behavior-triggered-email-setup-guide): the event to trigger mapping for the eight lifecycle emails
- [Whitepaper: the trial conversion operating system](https://www.conversioncrm.co/resources/whitepapers/the-trial-conversion-operating-system): the full PLG framework, funnel, six levers, scoring, and implementation
- [Checklist: 30 point trial conversion checklist](https://www.conversioncrm.co/resources/checklists/trial-conversion-launch-checklist): activation, onboarding emails, intent triggers, win back
- [Checklist: SaaS onboarding email checklist](https://www.conversioncrm.co/resources/checklists/saas-onboarding-email-checklist): the eight lifecycle emails, their triggers, and jobs
- [Template: 8 lifecycle email templates](https://www.conversioncrm.co/resources/templates/lifecycle-email-templates): copy ready subject lines and bodies for all eight emails
- [Template: activation tracking plan](https://www.conversioncrm.co/resources/templates/activation-tracking-plan): map your activation event, six scoring inputs, and email triggers
- [Trial to paid teardowns](https://www.conversioncrm.co/resources/case-studies): how Notion, Calendly, and Slack approach activation, from public info, plus the early case study program
- [Write for ConversionCRM](https://www.conversioncrm.co/contribute): guest post topics, byline policy, and how to pitch

## Product pages
- [Features](https://www.conversioncrm.co/features): 6-layer scoring, 8 lifecycle emails, real-time dashboard, dual-path email delivery, and zero-config tracking
- [Integrations](https://www.conversioncrm.co/integrations): works with any web framework (React, Next.js, Vue, SvelteKit) via script tag; REST API for backend events; any SMTP for email delivery
- [Security](https://www.conversioncrm.co/security): TLS 1.2+, AES-256 at rest, GDPR data processor, no data selling, 90-day raw event retention, deletion on request
- [Contact](https://www.conversioncrm.co/contact): support@conversioncrm.co, enterprise: ceo.conversioncrm@gmail.com, 24-hour response
- [Changelog](https://www.conversioncrm.co/changelog): product updates — June 2026 resources section, May 2026 dual-path email, April 2026 scoring and dashboard launch

## Free tools
- [Free XML Sitemap Builder](https://www.conversioncrm.co/tools/sitemap-builder): paste URLs, generate valid sitemap.xml instantly, copy or download; no AI, no sign-up, runs entirely in the browser
